[Technology, Media & Telecoms](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). 15/01/2021 • 2 minutes read. Ingrid Laane. Kamalika Patra. id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0003
text: Ingrid Laane. Kamalika Patra. The telecoms sector is affected both positively and negatively by the coronavirus crisis. Mass homeworking is driving higher demand for corporate network services and customers use their phones more. Offsetting this is a sharp drop in roaming income due to less travel, and revenue from the business market is falling.

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0004
text: Kamalika Patra. The telecoms sector is affected both positively and negatively by the coronavirus crisis. Mass homeworking is driving higher demand for corporate network services and customers use their phones more. Offsetting this is a sharp drop in roaming income due to less travel, and revenue from the business market is falling. In this TMT sector update, ABN AMRO highlights these and other industry developments.

[State of TMT (15 January 2021). 501 KB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/ABN-AMRO-Stand-van-TMT_tcm16-97188.pdf)
Revenue trends vary. Although growth in the IT industry was significantly lower in 2020 than in previous years, partly due to a drop in demand in consulting, the coronavirus crisis will deliver structural benefits to the industry in the long term. People shop and work more online and are expected to keep doing so after the pandemic. More online traffic gives the IT industry more work. Publishers, advertising agencies and broadcasters saw a strong recovery in the third quarter as media spending picked up.

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0012
text: Although growth in the IT industry was significantly lower in 2020 than in previous years, partly due to a drop in demand in consulting, the coronavirus crisis will deliver structural benefits to the industry in the long term. People shop and work more online and are expected to keep doing so after the pandemic. More online traffic gives the IT industry more work. Publishers, advertising agencies and broadcasters saw a strong recovery in the third quarter as media spending picked up. In the first two quarters of 2020 these industries still suffered steep contraction.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0012

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0013
text: People shop and work more online and are expected to keep doing so after the pandemic. More online traffic gives the IT industry more work. Publishers, advertising agencies and broadcasters saw a strong recovery in the third quarter as media spending picked up. In the first two quarters of 2020 these industries still suffered steep contraction. For printers, the ongoing shift to digital has led to a structural fall in demand for print for many years.

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0014
text: More online traffic gives the IT industry more work. Publishers, advertising agencies and broadcasters saw a strong recovery in the third quarter as media spending picked up. In the first two quarters of 2020 these industries still suffered steep contraction. For printers, the ongoing shift to digital has led to a structural fall in demand for print for many years. The coronavirus crisis came on top of that last year.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0014
metadata.source_slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
metadata.source_title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0015
text: Publishers, advertising agencies and broadcasters saw a strong recovery in the third quarter as media spending picked up. In the first two quarters of 2020 these industries still suffered steep contraction. For printers, the ongoing shift to digital has led to a structural fall in demand for print for many years. The coronavirus crisis came on top of that last year. Some recovery has begun, but it remains modest due to continuing restrictions on organising events and trade fairs, two major buyers of print.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0015

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0016
text: In the first two quarters of 2020 these industries still suffered steep contraction. For printers, the ongoing shift to digital has led to a structural fall in demand for print for many years. The coronavirus crisis came on top of that last year. Some recovery has begun, but it remains modest due to continuing restrictions on organising events and trade fairs, two major buyers of print. IT labour market is tight.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0016
metadata.source_slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
metadata.source_title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0017
text: For printers, the ongoing shift to digital has led to a structural fall in demand for print for many years. The coronavirus crisis came on top of that last year. Some recovery has begun, but it remains modest due to continuing restrictions on organising events and trade fairs, two major buyers of print. IT labour market is tight. The mismatch in the TMT sector between labour demand and supply fell only slightly due to the coronavirus crisis, as shown by ABN AMRO’s labour market indicator.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0017
metadata.source_slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
metadata.source_title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0018
text: The coronavirus crisis came on top of that last year. Some recovery has begun, but it remains modest due to continuing restrictions on organising events and trade fairs, two major buyers of print. IT labour market is tight. The mismatch in the TMT sector between labour demand and supply fell only slightly due to the coronavirus crisis, as shown by ABN AMRO’s labour market indicator. At the end of 2019, 16.2 per cent of vacancies in the TMT sector were unfillable, while by the end of 2020 this had declined to 14.1 per cent.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0018
metadata.source_slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
metadata.source_title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0019
text: Some recovery has begun, but it remains modest due to continuing restrictions on organising events and trade fairs, two major buyers of print. IT labour market is tight. The mismatch in the TMT sector between labour demand and supply fell only slightly due to the coronavirus crisis, as shown by ABN AMRO’s labour market indicator. At the end of 2019, 16.2 per cent of vacancies in the TMT sector were unfillable, while by the end of 2020 this had declined to 14.1 per cent. Trends in the labour market differ widely across the various industries.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0019
metadata.source_slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
metadata.source_title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0020
text: IT labour market is tight. The mismatch in the TMT sector between labour demand and supply fell only slightly due to the coronavirus crisis, as shown by ABN AMRO’s labour market indicator. At the end of 2019, 16.2 per cent of vacancies in the TMT sector were unfillable, while by the end of 2020 this had declined to 14.1 per cent. Trends in the labour market differ widely across the various industries. In the IT industry, the share of unfillable vacancies has fallen slightly, but remains very high at 28 per cent for IT developers and 30 per cent for IT programmers.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0020
metadata.source_slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
metadata.source_title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0021
text: The mismatch in the TMT sector between labour demand and supply fell only slightly due to the coronavirus crisis, as shown by ABN AMRO’s labour market indicator. At the end of 2019, 16.2 per cent of vacancies in the TMT sector were unfillable, while by the end of 2020 this had declined to 14.1 per cent. Trends in the labour market differ widely across the various industries. In the IT industry, the share of unfillable vacancies has fallen slightly, but remains very high at 28 per cent for IT developers and 30 per cent for IT programmers. This confirms the long-standing picture of structural tightness in this industry.

metadata.chunk_id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0021
metadata.source_slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
metadata.source_title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms

id: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom__c5-sentence-window__0022
text: At the end of 2019, 16.2 per cent of vacancies in the TMT sector were unfillable, while by the end of 2020 this had declined to 14.1 per cent. Trends in the labour market differ widely across the various industries. In the IT industry, the share of unfillable vacancies has fallen slightly, but remains very high at 28 per cent for IT developers and 30 per cent for IT programmers. This confirms the long-standing picture of structural tightness in this industry. In marketing and communications, by contrast, the share of unfillable vacancies is low, so there is currently no mismatch between demand and supply.
